issues.title: Regression on class OpenAiApi Builder or Costructor requiring api key
issues.body:
If the api key is not set or empty it fail with exception "API key value must not be null or empty"

However some openAI API-compatible servers (for example openvino server) to deploy local models do not require an api key. 

So this is a breaking change on spring-ai-openai 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT

comments.body: @fedecompa did you found a workaround for that?

I set a default unused key: 

.apiKey(new SimpleApiKey("openvino"))
